# Multiplication → Split Multiply-Accumulate

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Multiplication → Split Multiply-Accumulate

Split Multiply-Accumulate

Instruction Type and Width                 Instruction description
                                           Performs two independent sets of complex multiplication and
                                           accumulation between two complex numbers. Each complex
                                           source consists of real 16-bit part and imaginary 16-bit part. The
Vector Split Complex Multiply-Accumulate
                                           real and the imaginary products, 32-bit each, are sign-extended
                                           and accumulated with the destinations respectively, 40-bit wide
                                           each.
